title: CI Doctor MQ Failure Pattern
description: Canonical structure for an aggregated recurring-failure pattern record written by the CI Failure Doctor (Merge Queue) workflow to /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory/default/mq/patterns/<signature-hash>.json. Exactly one file per failure signature, updated via read-modify-write.

schema_version.description: Version of this pattern schema. Always "1.0".

signature.description: Stable, job-agnostic failure signature string formed as <normalized-error>|<category>.

signature_hash.description: Hash of the signature; matches the file name <signature-hash>.json.

count.description: Total number of times this signature has been observed, including the current run.

first_seen.description: ISO 8601 UTC time the signature was first recorded. Never changes after creation.

last_seen.description: ISO 8601 UTC time of the most recent occurrence.

recent_run_urls.description: Most recent workflow run URLs for this signature, newest first, capped at 10.

affected_prs.description: Most recent affected PR URLs for this signature, newest first, capped at 10.

recent_timestamps.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamps of recent occurrences (newest first), pruned to the last 24 hours. Must always include the current occurrence.
